concerns.text: Assumption block contains direct contradiction: 'The CoQA-MultiAgent dataset contains explicit cue-response pairs' followed immediately by 'The CoQA-MultiAgent dataset may not contain explicit cue annotations.' Both cannot be true simultaneously.
FR-002 claims 'three public 125 M‑parameter decoder‑only models' but lists gpt2 (125M), distilgpt2 (66M), and pythia-70m (70M). Parameter counts do not match the stated 125M specification.

Cross-references to non-existent sections: 'Methodological Soundness – Multiplicity', 'Threshold Justification & Sensitivity', 'Multiplicity & Power'. These section headers do not appear in the spec document.
Success criteria contain specific empirical values (SC-003: '≤ 0.07', SC-005: 'R² ≥ 0.85') that should be [deferred] per spec template guidance for planning documents.
Terminology inconsistency: 'Specialization Index' vs 'specialization index', 'Cue-Retrieval Efficiency' vs 'cue-retrieval efficiency'. Mixed case usage for the same concepts.
